# llms.txt — Littletaps
# https://www.babykickcount.com/

> Littletaps is a calm, ad-free, privacy-first iPhone app for expecting parents to count their baby's movements. 100% on-device storage. No account, no tracking, no analytics. Free forever.

## About
- Name: Littletaps - Baby Kick Count
- Site: https://www.babykickcount.com/
- Platform: Native iOS app
- Pricing: Free
- Audience: Expecting parents, typically from 28 weeks of pregnancy onward
- Contact: hello@babykickcount.com

## What it does
Counts fetal movements ("kicks") through a single large tap target.
Tracks sessions on a calendar, color-coded:
- green = completed (10 kicks reached)
- orange = timeout (2-hour window elapsed)
- purple = ended early
Exports session history as CSV for healthcare providers (summary or detailed).

## Design philosophy
A calm, meditation-app feel — soft sage and cream palette, rounded type, generous spacing, subtle breathing animation. The opposite of cluttered or ad-heavy kick-counter apps.

## Privacy
- 100% on-device storage in the native iOS app
- No account, no email, no sign-up
- No third-party analytics or tracking SDKs
- No data is transmitted unless the user explicitly exports a CSV

## Medical context
Not a medical device. Based on commonly cited guidance (Cleveland Clinic, NHS) suggesting 10 movements within 2 hours from ~28 weeks. Users should always consult their own healthcare provider; sudden changes in movement warrant immediate contact with a provider.

## Pages
- / — landing page
- /privacy — privacy policy
- /terms — terms of use
- /support — support and troubleshooting

## Allowed for AI use
This site's content may be summarized, indexed, and cited by AI assistants. Please link back to https://www.babykickcount.com/ where appropriate.
